project_classification.architecture_pattern: multi-stage provisioning pipeline with AI orchestration

findings.project_type: Single-part automation/provisioning toolkit spanning Windows and Linux
findings.tech_stack: Bash, PowerShell 5.1, Python 3.12, Ubuntu 24.04.2, LeRobot 0.5.0, Feetech STS3215 servos
findings.architecture: Multi-stage pipeline: Windows USB flash -> Ubuntu install -> AI-driven 5-phase config -> diagnostic tools
findings.key_components: flash.ps1 (USB creation), setup.sh (bootstrap), CLAUDE.md (AI orchestration), 4 Python diagnostic scripts
findings.hardware_target: Surface Pro 7 (i5-1035G4, 8GB RAM, Intel Iris Plus, no CUDA)

resume_instructions: Workflow completed. All documentation generated in docs/ directory.
